task.title: Plan Status, Graph, and Diff Table UI sprint
task.summary: Plan the UI sprint that will make CodeWiki status, graph navigation, and feedback diff-table decisions directly visible and interactive after the data contracts are stable.

goal.outcome: Users can visually inspect health, scope, graph relationships, and approve/reject/defer feedback diff rows without reading generated JSON or relying on chat-only confirmations.
acceptance: Status panel shows compact health, active scope, sprint/task focus, gates, budget burn, claims/conflicts, and next action.
Graph navigation exposes source-of-truth links, build DAG edges, stale/missing links, and scoped roadmap/sprint/task graph slices.
Interactive diff-table UI supports approve, reject, defer, and propose-alternative actions per row before accepted rows compile into feedback builds.
UI reads graph/API state and runtime pending diff tables instead of duplicating canonical truth.
User-facing closure brief is visible from task close/implementation evidence.
non_goals: Do not implement before Build Contract v2 and core scope contracts exist.
Do not make UI-only state canonical truth.
Do not duplicate full generated JSON in the panel.
verification: Graph/status panel fixtures or snapshots for core states.

summary: Implemented Status, Graph, and Diff Table UI sprint: compact Home scope/budget/claim/GC factors, Graph tab for scoped graph/build DAG inspection, Diff tab for pending feedback diff decisions, and runtime diff table tool/state.

evidence: Added feature smoke tests for runtime diff table actions and graph panel data; smoke-test covers codewiki_diff_table tool registration and proposal path.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Added runtime diff-table application service/tool, Graph/Diff status panel tabs, status command section routing, and Home scope/budget/claims/GC factors.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added feature smoke tests for runtime diff table actions and graph panel data; smoke-test covers codewiki_diff_table tool registration and proposal path.
code_change_evidence: Added runtime diff-table application service/tool, Graph/Diff status panel tabs, status command section routing, and Home scope/budget/claims/GC factors.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Status panel shows compact health, active scope, sprint/task focus, gates, budget burn, claims/conflicts, and next action.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Home tab now includes workflow scope/loop/output, configured token/cost/session budgets, active claims/conflicts, GC hot task counts, and existing health/current focus/next action factors.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Graph navigation exposes source-of-truth links, build DAG edges, stale/missing links, and scoped roadmap/sprint/task graph slices.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph tab reads index_graph.json and renders node/edge counts, scope lines, build_* DAG edges, reconciliation items, and detail cards.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Interactive diff-table UI supports approve, reject, defer, and propose-alternative actions per row before accepted rows compile into feedback builds.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Runtime diff-table store and codewiki_diff_table tool manage pending rows; Diff tab supports a/x/d/p key actions and alternative prompt for editable rows.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: UI reads graph/API state and runtime pending diff tables instead of duplicating canonical truth.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph tab reads generated graph; Diff tab reads .codewiki/runtime/diff-tables.json or accepted feedback builds as read-only fallback; no UI-only canonical truth was added.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: User-facing closure brief is visible from task close/implementation evidence.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Implementation builds now persist closure_brief; TASK-056/TASK-057 builds include user-facing closure briefs tied to validation evidence.

closure_brief.user_intent: Make status, graph visualization, and feedback diff-table decisions visible and interactive so users can trust accepted intent and closure evidence without reading raw generated JSON.
implemented_changes: Added Graph tab with scoped graph/build DAG/reconciliation inspection.
Added Diff tab with pending diff row approve/reject/defer/alternative actions and read-only accepted-build fallback.
Added codewiki_diff_table runtime tool/state for pending feedback diff tables.
Added Home tab factors for scope, loop, budgets, claims, conflicts, and GC hot state.
acceptance_evidence: Feature smoke tests cover diff-table state/actions and graph panel data.
non_goals_preserved: No full diagram editor was added.
No Mermaid editing in UI was added.
UI-only state was not made canonical truth.
Full generated JSON is not dumped in the panel.
remaining_risks: Live Pi UI manual smoke needs extension reload.

risks: Manual Pi UI smoke still requires reloading this extension in a live Pi TUI.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: feat(ui): add graph and diff table status views
commit.body:
Implemented Status, Graph, and Diff Table UI sprint: compact Home scope/budget/claim/GC factors, Graph tab for scoped graph/build DAG inspection, Diff tab for pending feedback diff decisions, and runtime diff table tool/state.

Checks: npx tsc --noEmit, node scripts/check-architecture.mjs, npm test
Validation: .codewiki/validation/2026-05-11-implementation-pass-task-057.json
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
